line_items.description: Hand-knotted wool pile carpets, Persian design, wool face pile on cotton warp and weft, individually woven in traditional patterns (Tabriz, Isfahan, Kashan designs), various sizes from 4x6 to 9x12 feet

additional_context: Antique and decorative carpet purchase from Iranian dealer. Seller claims carpets are over 20 years old. OFAC general license may be required for certain antique goods.
